kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//input[@placeholder='กรอกชื่อผู้ใช้หรืออีเมล']
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'admin@example.com' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='กรอกชื่อผู้ใช้หรืออีเมล']'.
kw.arg: xpath=//input[@placeholder='กรอกชื่อผู้ใช้หรืออีเมล']
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Typing password into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='กรอกรหัสผ่าน']'.
Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.arg: xpath=//input[@placeholder='กรอกรหัสผ่าน']
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[contains(.,'เข้าสู่ระบบ')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(.,'เข้าสู่ระบบ')]
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Does Not Contain
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL does not contains ``location``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Does Not Contain
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL does not contains ``location``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Location Should Contain
kw.msg: Location should have contained 'login' but it was 'http://localhost:3001/admin/users?page=1'.
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.
kw.status: Location should have contained 'login' but it was 'http://localhost:3001/admin/users?page=1'.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Page should have contained text 'ไม่สามารถโหลดข้อมูลได้' but did not.
kw.arg: ไม่สามารถโหลดข้อมูลได้
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.
kw.status: Page should have contained text 'ไม่สามารถโหลดข้อมูลได้' but did not.

kw.arg: ไม่สามารถโหลดข้อมูลได้
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Get Location
kw.doc: Returns the current browser window URL.

kw.name: Should Not Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` contains ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Location Should Contain
kw.msg: Location should have contained 'login' but it was 'http://localhost:3001/admin/users?page=1'.
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.
kw.status: Location should have contained 'login' but it was 'http://localhost:3001/admin/users?page=1'.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Page should have contained text 'ไม่สามารถโหลดข้อมูลได้' but did not.
kw.arg: ไม่สามารถโหลดข้อมูลได้
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.
kw.status: Page should have contained text 'ไม่สามารถโหลดข้อมูลได้' but did not.

kw.arg: ไม่สามารถโหลดข้อมูลได้
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Element Should Be Enabled
kw.doc: Verifies that element identified by ``locator`` is enabled.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Pass Execution If
kw.arg: Only one page - skip pagination test
kw.doc: Conditionally skips rest of the current test, setup, or teardown with PASS status.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

Element Should Be Disabled

kw.name: Exit For Loop If
kw.doc: Stops executing the enclosing FOR loop if the ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the number of elements matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

test.name: TC07 Log Page Shows User Summary

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.msg: No keyword with name 'Page Contains Element' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Page Contains Element' found.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Location Should Contain
kw.msg: Location should have contained 'login' but it was 'http://localhost:3001/admin/users?page=1'.
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.
kw.status: Location should have contained 'login' but it was 'http://localhost:3001/admin/users?page=1'.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Page should have contained text 'ไม่สามารถโหลดข้อมูลได้' but did not.
kw.arg: ไม่สามารถโหลดข้อมูลได้
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.
kw.status: Page should have contained text 'ไม่สามารถโหลดข้อมูลได้' but did not.

kw.arg: ไม่สามารถโหลดข้อมูลได้
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: window.scrollTo(0, 0) Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'ผู้ใช้'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'อีเมล'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'บทบาท'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'สถานะ'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'ยืนยันตัวตน'.
kw.arg: ยืนยันตัวตน
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
